query_groups.nature_language: 我们三个人从广州去武汉玩2天，预算1800元，需要家庭房，想品尝湖北菜。
query_groups.nature_language_en: Three of us want to travel from Guangzhou to Wuhan for 2 days with a budget of 1800 RMB, needing family rooms and trying Hubei cuisine.

query_groups.nature_language: 我们三个人坐高铁从广州去武汉特种兵式2天游，预算1800元，需要家庭房，吃不辣的湖北菜，快速打卡历史古迹和亲子景点。
query_groups.nature_language_en: Three of us want to take high-speed rail from Guangzhou to Wuhan for an intensive 2-day trip with a budget of 1800 RMB, needing family rooms, trying non-spicy Hubei cuisine, quickly visiting historical sites and family-friendly attractions.

query_groups.nature_language: 我和老人从成都去北京旅行6天，预算4800元。
query_groups.nature_language_en: I want to travel with an elderly person from Chengdu to Beijing for 6 days with a budget of 4800 RMB.

query_groups.nature_language: 我和老人坐飞机从成都去北京旅行6天，预算4800元，需要24小时前台服务的酒店。
query_groups.nature_language_en: I want to fly with an elderly person from Chengdu to Beijing for 6 days with a budget of 4800 RMB, needing hotels with 24-hour front desk service.

query_groups.nature_language: 我和老人坐飞机从成都去北京慢游6天，预算4800元，需要有24小时前台和电梯的酒店，吃不辣的北京菜，参观历史古迹、博物馆和公园。
query_groups.nature_language_en: I want to fly with an elderly person from Chengdu to Beijing for a slow 6-day trip with a budget of 4800 RMB, needing hotels with 24-hour front desk and elevators, trying non-spicy Beijing cuisine, visiting historical sites, museums, and parks.

query_groups.nature_language: 我们四个人从上海去重庆玩4天，预算4800元。
query_groups.nature_language_en: Four of us want to travel from Shanghai to Chongqing for 4 days with a budget of 4800 RMB.

query_groups.nature_language: 我们四个人坐飞机从上海去重庆玩4天，预算4800元，需要亲子主题房。
query_groups.nature_language_en: Four of us want to fly from Shanghai to Chongqing for 4 days with a budget of 4800 RMB, needing family-themed rooms.

query_groups.nature_language: 我们四个人坐飞机从上海去重庆慢游4天，预算4800元，住江河景的亲子主题房，吃不太辣的川菜，参观网红打卡点、亲子景点和夜经济热点。
query_groups.nature_language_en: Four of us want to fly from Shanghai to Chongqing for a slow 4-day trip with a budget of 4800 RMB, staying in river-view family-themed rooms, trying mild Sichuan cuisine, visiting internet-famous spots, family-friendly attractions, and night economy hotspots.

query_groups.nature_language: 我们六个人从武汉去深圳旅行7天，预算10500元。
query_groups.nature_language_en: Six of us want to travel from Wuhan to Shenzhen for 7 days with a budget of 10500 RMB.

query_groups.nature_language: 我们六个人坐飞机从武汉去深圳旅行7天，预算10500元，需要家庭房和儿童俱乐部。
query_groups.nature_language_en: Six of us want to fly from Wuhan to Shenzhen for 7 days with a budget of 10500 RMB, needing family rooms and kids' club.

query_groups.nature_language: 我们六个人坐飞机从武汉去深圳慢游7天，预算10500元，需要家庭房和儿童俱乐部但不要单人房，品尝粤菜海鲜，参观亲子景点、游乐园和现代建筑。
query_groups.nature_language_en: Six of us want to fly from Wuhan to Shenzhen for a slow 7-day trip with a budget of 10500 RMB, needing family rooms and kids' club (no single rooms), trying Cantonese cuisine and seafood, visiting family-friendly attractions, amusement parks, and modern architecture.
